title: Leadership is a Team Sport
description: The most critical unit of leadership in any organization is the top team, not the individual at the top.

title: Team Building Happens by Achieving Outcomes in New Ways
description: Not just shareholder returns. Teams exist to create value across all stakeholders. If we're honest, most organizations are falling short.

title: Plays, Not Prescriptions
description: Like a sports team, executive teams need a playbook of adaptable moves, not rigid processes.

title: Practice Makes Permanent
description: Real change comes through repeated practice, not one-off events or workshops.

title: Conflict is Data, Not Dysfunction
description: Divergent views tell us where reality is unclear and where assumptions differ. The goal isn't consensus — it's shared clarity.
